body_txt: Somewhere in between the Law of Disproportionate Response and Berserk Button . Alice and Bob are fighting. Alice manages to destroy/ruin/mangle Bob's shirt/sunglasses/hair/whatever. This unhinges Bob and he suddenly goes into Determinator mode. While the destroyed item is often a #1 Dime , the reaction usually comes out of the blue. Not necessarily something to make him go berserk, but to Bob, it's like she kicked the dog . If Alice was bad before, now she's unforgivable . Can be a Stock Phrase . Compare Lost Food Grievance , Doomed New Clothes , and Wardrobe Wound .
